prompt: A highly detailed Islamic geometric tile wall inspired by 12th-century Persian architecture, where one section displays a perfectly balanced repeating geometric pattern with symmetry and harmony, while an adjacent section shows an overly intricate and distorted version of the same pattern, with excessive detail breaking the symmetry and creating visual imbalance, emphasizing complexity over coherence, traditional tile colors of deep blue, turquoise, white, and gold, precise linework, flat decorative style, no modern elements, no text, no diagrams, architectural realism, physically plausible wall surface
